metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 👑 Privileged Account Abuse Across Systems
---
An account touching Windows servers, Unix servers, network infrastructure, and Azure in a 30-minute window is either a breach or a misconfiguration. Correlates admin activity across SecurityEvent, Syslog, CommonSecurityLog, and AuditLogs."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔑 Windows Privileged Activity"},"name":"win-priv-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4728, 4732, 4756, 4720, 4726, 4648, 4672)
| extend EventDescription = case(
    EventID == 4728, 'Member added to global group',
    EventID == 4732, 'Member added to local admin group',
    EventID == 4756, 'Member added to universal group',
    EventID == 4720, 'New account created',
    EventID == 4726, 'Account deleted',
    EventID == 4648, 'Explicit credentials used',
    EventID == 4672, 'Special privileges assigned',
    'Other'
)
| project TimeGenerated, EventID, EventDescription, SubjectUserName, TargetUserName, Computer
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Windows privileged operations — group changes, new accounts, explicit credentials","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-win-priv"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4672
| summarize Count = count() by SubjectUserName
| sort by Count desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Accounts with most special privilege assignments","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Count","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-special-priv"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🐧 Unix Root / Sudo Activity"},"name":"unix-priv-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Syslog
| where Facility == 'authpriv'
| where SyslogMessage has_any ('sudo:', 'su:', 'root', 'COMMAND=', 'session opened for user root')
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, HostIP, SyslogMessage
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Unix sudo / su / root session activity","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-unix-root"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Syslog
| where Facility == 'authpriv'
| where SyslogMessage has 'COMMAND='
| extend SudoUser = extract(@'(\S+) : TTY', 1, SyslogMessage)
| summarize SudoCount = count() by HostName, SudoUser
| where SudoCount > 5
| sort by SudoCount desc","size":0,"title":"Accounts with high sudo command count","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SudoCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-sudo-count"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔗 Cross-System Admin Activity — Same Account, Multiple Layers"},"name":"cross-priv-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let WinAdmins = SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4672, 4728, 4732, 4648)
| where isnotempty(SubjectUserName) and SubjectUserName !has '$'
| summarize WinPrivEvents = count() by AccountName = tolower(SubjectUserName);
let EntraAdmins = AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add member to role', 'Add application', 'Delete user', 'Reset user password')
| extend Actor = tolower(tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName))
| where isnotempty(Actor)
| summarize EntraPrivEvents = count() by AccountName = Actor;
WinAdmins
| join kind=inner EntraAdmins on AccountName
| project AccountName, WinPrivEvents, EntraPrivEvents
| extend TotalPrivEvents = WinPrivEvents + EntraPrivEvents
| sort by TotalPrivEvents desc","size":0,"title":"Accounts with privileged activity on BOTH Windows and Entra — high-privilege accounts to monitor","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"WinPrivEvents","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":100}},{"columnMatch":"EntraPrivEvents","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}},{"columnMatch":"TotalPrivEvents","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":200}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-cross-priv"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == 'Cisco' and DeviceProduct has 'ISE'
| where SourceUserName has_any ('admin', 'root', 'administrator', 'superuser', 'sysadmin')
| project TimeGenerated, SourceUserName, SourceIP, DeviceAction, Activity
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30","size":0,"title":"Privileged account NAC/ISE authentications","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-ise-priv"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
